channel.title: dotnet/roslyn Pull Requests
channel.description: Pull Requests from https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn, generated by https://github.com/meziantou/IssuesToRss/

item.title: PR: List patterns: Fix pattern lookup on nullable types - @alrz
PR: Make VS16.10 the minimum required VS for builds - @JoeRobich
PR: Fix 'keyword recommenders' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Switch to full ngen for Roslyn binaries - @genlu
item.description: This reverts commit 55366698b723a70800cf679b84154ca98d69f4ed, the change was originally implemented in #53837

item.title: PR: Remove file count limitation in server build - @jaredpar
item.description:
The server protocol used to enforce a max of 65,535 files passed to the compilation. This isn't due to any limitation in the compiler but instead a guard against a bug in one of our internal build systems. It provided graceful failure when a build authoring bug caused the contents of the file system to be passed to the compiler.

That is no longer an issue and the existing limit is blocking real customer scenarios. Should it become an issue again there is code we could insert into the customer targets to add a similar guard.

I thought for a bit on what a new limit should be and eventually decided there wasn't a reasonable one. The compiler server already has a protocol guard on the size of the message payload. The batch compiler generally doesn't enforce limits of this nature, insead we attempt to scale to the build requested by the user. Hence just removed the limitation entirely

closes #54775

item.title: PR: Fix 'group usings' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Remove dependency on Type.IsSerializable from OptionSet serialization - @CyrusNajmabadi
item.description: Previous code depended on both sides of the OOP communication channel agreeing on what types are serializable or not. new code does not.

item.title: PR: Fix 'add extern alias' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Fix 'rename' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Fix 'name completion' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Fix 'organize usings' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Fix 'syntax generator' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Fix 'syntactic classification' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Don't combine 'this.' with underscore named fields - @CyrusNajmabadi
item.description: The point of hte naming is to make it clear that it's a private instance field. So it's redundant to state this. to access it. Note that these cases are the outliers and more than 99% of all field accesses (yes, i checked) do not use this.

item.title: PR: Don't skip suppressors with /skipAnalyzers - @mavasani
item.description:
Skipping suppressors can actually be a breaking change as an unsuppressed warning that could have been suppressed by a suppressor can be escalated to an error with /warnaserror. skipAnalyzers flag was only designed to skip diagnostic analyzers, so this PR ensures the same by never skipping suppressors.

NOTE: First 2 commits in the PR are just cherry-picks from https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn/pull/54915, which fix and unskip existing DiagnosticSuppressor unit tests.

item.title: PR: Call EnsureSufficientExecutionStack in PrintMembers - @RikkiGibson
item.description: Related to dotnet/roslyn-analyzers#5068 Related to dotnet/csharplang#4951 Related to #48646

item.title: PR: Fix 'line separators' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Fix 'simplify type names' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Notify Pythia when item is being committed - @genlu
item.description:
Address #53712

Question for @dibarbet @allisonchou If/how this can be hooked up in LSP?

item.title: PR: Adjust AllowMultiple behavior with generic attributes - @RikkiGibson
PR: Fix 'convert tuple to struct' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Fix 'convert anonymous type' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Reloadable types - IDE - @tmat
PR: Fix 'keyword recommenders' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Fix 'completion suggestion mode' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Give 'typeof'-like errors in attribute type arguments - @RikkiGibson
PR: Fix NuGet warnings with VS17 preview 2 packages - @JoeRobich
item.description: The changes made in https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn/pull/54635 didn't flow into 17.0-vs-deps.

item.title: PR: Merges/main to features/generic attributes - @RikkiGibson
PR: Fix 'add using' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Fix 'use auto property' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Fix 'remove unused usings' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Fix 'misplaced usings' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Fix 'add accessibility' with file scoped namespaces - @CyrusNajmabadi
PR: Merge main into inline errors - @akhera99
PR: Move Unused Reference analysis out of proc - @JoeRobich
item.description:
Fixes https://devdiv.visualstudio.com/DevDiv/_workitems/edit/1358121 (microsoft)

The issue was caused by dependencies with deep transitive reference trees. The fix was to avoid building a list of all assemblies brought into the compilation by the dependency and to instead traverse the tree checking for various conditions.

item.title: PR: Fix diagnostic suppressor unit tests - @mavasani
PR: Implicitly skip compiler's nullable analysis when implicitly skipping… - @mavasani
item.description:
… analyzers

Follow-up to https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn/pull/54143 Work towards AB#1337109

This improves the build time for implicitly triggered builds by approximately 7-8% when nullable has been enabled for the project.

item.title: PR: Make TypeSymbol.cs/IsTupleTypeOfCardinality internal - @AndreyTretyak
item.description: Fixes https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn/issues/48291 IsTupleTypeOfCardinality already could be used only internally, so it's just to reduce future questions.

item.title: PR: Fix typo (Memebers -> Members) - @AndreyTretyak
PR: Fix typo - @gAlfonso-bit
PR: Initial work to have AwaitCompletionProvider in VB - @Youssef1313
PR: Fix MakeTypeAbstract to preserve existing modifiers - @davidwengier
PR: update colors for light theme - @jmarolf
